message:
test(core): add boundary tests for config, error Display, and tracing constants

config: Add tests for quality_weight boundary values (0.0 and 1.0),
TwoTierMetrics clone independence, Debug format coverage for config and
metrics, partial TOML graceful fallback to defaults, and fast_only env
override parsing.

error: Add comprehensive Display and source-chain tests for all SearchError
variants: EmbedderUnavailable, ModelNotFound, ModelLoadFailed (with
std::error::Error::source() chain verification), IndexCorrupted,
IndexVersionMismatch, QueryParseError, SearchTimeout, RerankerUnavailable,
and additional variants covering the full error taxonomy.

tracing_config: Add tests verifying all span_names constants start with
the TARGET_PREFIX, all field_names constants are non-empty, parse_level
rejects whitespace-padded input, and level_from_env falls back to default
when the env var is unset.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
